comment: imx585 ClearHDR presets, applied with the CineMate CLI command 'hdr profile [n]' (a bare 'hdr profile' cycles to the next entry). Applying a profile restarts the camera. Fields: hdr = ClearHDR on/off (wide_dynamic_range); threshold = [low, high] HG->LG data-selection thresholds, 0-4095 each; blend_mode = driver menu 0-8 (0 = HG 1/2 + LG 1/2); gain_adder = driver menu 0-5 (2 = +12 dB). Knob fields are optional, but explicit values keep profiles deterministic because sensor controls persist until reboot.

profiles.name: sdr
profiles.notes: ClearHDR off - standard 10/12-bit modes, full frame rates.

profiles.name: hdr-default
profiles.notes: Driver defaults: 16-bit linear ClearHDR, HG 1/2 + LG 1/2 blend, +12 dB gain adder.

profiles.name: hdr-highlight
profiles.notes: Earlier HG->LG hand-off for more highlight headroom; starting point for taming the blend-knee magenta in bright flats.
